title: rubus × henryanus
intro: Rubus × henryanus, also known as the hybrid blackberry, is a cross between the European blackberry (Rubus fruticosus) and the Himalayan blackberry (Rubus armeniacus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × henryanus include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or syrup, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate digestive issues.
